halo.gun.br55hb.desc:
For decades, the BR55 had steadily gained favor over the long-serving M392 Designated Marksman Rifle.
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo3 2007
halo.gun.br55hb.name: BR55HB Battle Rifle
halo.gun.korva.desc:
The Korva-pattern Flak Launcher is a fuel rod gun variant, prominently employed by the Covenant and its remnant forces.
Manufacturer:§5Assembly Forges §3§nHalo:Reach 2010
halo.gun.korva.name: Korva-pattern Fuel Rod Gun|Type-33 LAAW
halo.gun.m392.desc:
The DMR is unparalleled in neutralizing unshielded enemies, as a single headshot is always fatal.
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo:Reach 2010
halo.gun.m392.name: M392 DMR
halo.gun.m45e.desc:
It was heavily used by Army garrisons on Reach during the Fall of Reach, and was a particularly favourite weapon of Emile-A239.
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo:Reach 2010
halo.gun.m45e.name: M45E Tactical Shotgun
halo.gun.m6d.desc:
I don't keep it loaded, son. You'll have to find ammo as you go.
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo:Combat Evolved 2001
halo.gun.m6d.name: M6D Magnum Pistol
halo.gun.m6d_srs.name: §eSRS99C Super Magnum Pistol
halo.gun.ma5b.desc:
So how do we get inside the ship if it's in the air? The Corps issued me a rifle, not wings!
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo:Combat Evolved 2001
halo.gun.ma5b.name: MA5B Assault Rifle
halo.gun.srs99c.desc:
The Covenant begrudgingly considered this weapon to be both accurate and powerful.
Manufacturer:§9Misriah Armory §3§nHalo:Combat Evolved 2001
halo.gun.srs99c.name: SRS99C-S2 AM Sniper Rifle
halo.gun.t1un.desc: A noble and ancient weapon, wielded by the strongest of Sangheili, requires great skill and bravery to use, and inspires fear in those who face its elegant plasma blade. Manufacturer:§5Merchants of Qikost §3§nHalo:Reach 2010
halo.gun.t1un.name: Energy Sword|Type-1 EW/S
